title: Leg cramps - NHS
text:
nancy (usually in the later stage) certain medicines – for example, medicine for lowering cholesterol ( statins ) or high blood pressure (diuretics) not drinking enough fluids ( dehydration ) liver disease because of drinking too much alcohol The reason for some cramps is unknown.
Page last reviewed: 01 December 2023
Next review due: 01 December 2026
